title: Pipeline Tool
description: Exposes any RocketRide pipeline as an agent tool.
The agent calls this tool with a text input; the node starts the target
pipeline via the SDK, sends the input through its webhook source,
and returns the configured response lane back to the agent.

tool_pipe.pipe.title: Pipeline File
tool_pipe.pipe.description: Path to the .pipe file to run as a tool

tool_pipe.tool_name.title: Tool Name
tool_pipe.tool_name.description: Short identifier the agent uses when referring to this tool (e.g. search_graveyard)

tool_pipe.tool_description.title: Tool Description
tool_pipe.tool_description.description: Natural-language description the agent uses to decide when to call this tool

tool_pipe.return_type.title: Return Type
tool_pipe.return_type.description: Which response lane to return to the agent
